minichallenge.label: MINI CHALLENGE
minichallenge.broadcastNote: All rounds support the BTCC, so coverage is the BTCC package: ITV4/ITVX (UK/IE), RACER+ (US/CA), and the official BTCC YouTube channel for the rest of the world.

minitrophy.label: MINI CHALLENGE Trophy
minitrophy.broadcastNote: Coverage varies by round — BTCC-supporting rounds air on the listed broadcasters above; standalone rounds stream only on YouTube/MINIChallengeUK worldwide. Open each event for the broadcaster carrying that specific round.
